title: Auto-Save Drafts on Tab/Window Blur
description: This feature will automatically save the current editor content as a draft whenever the user navigates away from the editor tab or window. This ensures that user input is preserved even if they switch tabs, preventing data loss and the need to re-enter work.
implementation_idea: Utilize browser 'blur' and 'visibilitychange' events to trigger an automatic save of the editor's content to local storage or a temporary server-side draft when the tab loses focus or becomes hidden.
expected_impact: Eliminate user-reported data loss in the editor due to tab switching, significantly reducing user frustration and wasted effort.

title: Session Persistence and Auto-Save
description: This feature will ensure that user sessions remain active and persistent even through minor network interruptions or backend refreshes. Additionally, it will implement an automatic saving mechanism for in-progress work, minimizing data loss if an unexpected logout does occur.
implementation_idea: Utilize local storage or IndexedDB for periodic auto-saving of user input and state. Implement a robust session management system with token refresh mechanisms and server-side session validation to prevent premature logouts.
expected_impact: Eliminate data loss due to unexpected logouts and significantly reduce workflow disruption, improving user satisfaction and productivity for affected users.

title: Dark Mode Toggle
description: This feature introduces a 'Dark Mode' option within the user settings, allowing users to switch the application's interface from a light theme to a dark theme. This will significantly reduce eye strain and improve comfort for users working in low-light conditions or those who prefer a darker visual aesthetic.
implementation_idea: Implement a CSS-based theme switcher that applies a 'dark-mode' class to the body element, overriding default styles with dark-themed counterparts. Store user preference in local storage or user settings.
expected_impact: Reduce reported eye strain and discomfort by 80% for users who prefer dark interfaces, and increase overall user satisfaction.

title: CSV Data Export for Reports
description: This feature will allow users to export the data displayed in any report or table within the application directly into a CSV file. Users can then easily import this data into other tools for further analysis, custom reporting, or archival purposes, addressing their need for interoperability and flexible data handling.
implementation_idea: Add an 'Export to CSV' button next to existing report views. On click, the backend will query the displayed data, format it into a CSV string, and serve it as a downloadable file.
expected_impact: Enable users to integrate application data with external reporting tools, reducing manual data entry and improving efficiency for weekly reporting tasks.

title: Project Dashboard Performance Optimization with Virtualized Scrolling
description: This feature will implement virtualized scrolling and lazy loading for the project list on the dashboard. It will only render projects visible in the viewport, significantly reducing the DOM size and data processed, thereby improving load times and responsiveness for users with large project portfolios.
implementation_idea: Utilize a UI virtualization library (e.g., React Window, Vue Virtual Scroller) to render only a subset of projects visible to the user, fetching additional data as the user scrolls.
expected_impact: Reduce dashboard load times by 70-80% for users with over 50 projects, eliminating timeouts and making the dashboard usable for large teams.

title: Email Notification Health Dashboard
description: This feature will provide users with a dedicated dashboard displaying the real-time status of their email notification system. It will show whether emails are being sent, delivered, or if there are any errors, allowing users to quickly identify and troubleshoot issues with their configured alerts.
implementation_idea: Develop a new UI component that queries email service logs and delivery receipts, then aggregates and displays this information in an easily digestible format within the user's settings or a dedicated 'Notifications' section.
expected_impact: Reduce user frustration and support tickets related to undelivered email notifications by providing transparency and self-service troubleshooting capabilities.

title: Mobile UI Responsiveness Fix
description: This feature involves a comprehensive audit and refactor of the mobile UI codebase to address unresponsive buttons and broken scrolling. It will ensure all interactive elements function correctly and content is easily navigable on various mobile devices, making the product fully usable on phones.
implementation_idea: Conduct a thorough review of CSS, JavaScript event listeners, and viewport meta tags specific to mobile breakpoints. Prioritize fixing known issues with button click events and overflow scrolling properties, potentially leveraging a more robust mobile-first CSS framework or library.
expected_impact: Eliminate critical mobile usability issues, leading to 100% of mobile UI elements being responsive and functional, thereby making the product fully accessible and usable for all mobile users.

title: Universal Undo/Redo History
description: Implement a universal undo/redo mechanism accessible via keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl/Cmd+Z, Ctrl/Cmd+Y) and a dedicated UI button. This feature will track a history of user actions, allowing them to revert accidental changes and recover from destructive operations like deletions, significantly reducing data loss and user frustration.
implementation_idea: Maintain an in-memory stack of user actions (commands) for each session, allowing for push (do) and pop (undo/redo) operations. Each command object would encapsulate the action and the necessary data to reverse it.
expected_impact: Eliminate data loss from accidental actions for 90% of users and reduce user frustration related to irreversible operations by 80%.

title: Enhanced Project Search with Fuzzy Matching and Indexing
description: This feature will overhaul the existing search mechanism to accurately return relevant project results, even with minor typos or partial inputs. It will significantly reduce the time users spend manually searching for projects, improving overall efficiency and user satisfaction.
implementation_idea: Implement a robust search index (e.g., using Elasticsearch or Lucene) for project names and relevant metadata, coupled with fuzzy matching algorithms to handle inexact queries.
expected_impact: Reduce manual project navigation time by an estimated 80% and eliminate user frustration related to non-functional search.

title: Configurable Bulk Action Limits
description: This feature allows users to adjust the number of items processed in a single bulk action, up to a system-defined maximum. It directly addresses the inefficiency of small batches, enabling users with large datasets to perform updates much more quickly and with fewer repetitive actions.
implementation_idea: Introduce a user interface element (e.g., a dropdown or input field) within the bulk actions modal to select the batch size. Backend logic will need to be updated to handle larger payloads and ensure efficient processing without timeouts.
expected_impact: Reduce the time users spend on bulk updates by an estimated 80-90% for large datasets, significantly improving user satisfaction and productivity for power users.

title: Team Workspace & Invitation System
description: This feature allows users to create a shared team workspace where they can invite teammates via email. Invited members can access and collaborate on projects within this shared space, moving work from individual silos to a centralized team environment.
implementation_idea: Implement a 'Team' entity linked to multiple 'User' entities and 'Project' entities. Develop an invitation flow using email verification and role-based access control for team members.
expected_impact: Increase team collaboration and project sharing by 50% within the first quarter, leading to higher user engagement and retention for teams.

title: Notion Import Status & Retry Mechanism
description: This feature will provide real-time status updates for Notion imports, clearly indicating if an import is in progress, failed, or completed. It will also include a 'retry' button for failed imports and potentially offer diagnostic information or common troubleshooting steps to help users resolve issues.
implementation_idea: Implement a background job processing queue for Notion imports with robust error logging and status updates pushed to the frontend. The retry mechanism would re-queue the original import request. Consider integrating with Notion API's rate limit handling and error codes.
expected_impact: Reduce user frustration and support tickets related to stuck Notion imports by providing transparency and self-service recovery options, improving successful import rates by at least 50% for affected users.

title: Transparent Free Plan Usage & Billing Alerts
description: This feature provides real-time tracking of free plan usage against limits and sends proactive notifications when users approach or exceed these limits. It will clearly communicate potential charges before they occur, allowing users to upgrade or adjust usage.
implementation_idea: Integrate usage tracking into the billing system, define thresholds for alerts, and implement an in-app notification and email system for warnings and charge confirmations.
expected_impact: Reduce instances of unexpected charges by 90% and increase user trust in billing transparency.

title: Interactive 'Getting Started' Checklist
description: This feature introduces an interactive, persistent checklist that appears immediately after signup, guiding users through essential first steps like profile setup, connecting integrations, or creating their first project. Each completed item provides positive reinforcement and unlocks the next logical action, ensuring users always know what to do next.
implementation_idea: Implement a front-end component that displays a dynamic checklist, storing user progress in a database. Utilize conditional rendering to show relevant steps based on completion status and user role.
expected_impact: Reduce post-signup abandonment rate by 20% and increase feature adoption for core functionalities within the first 24 hours.

title: Slack Notification Channel Setup
description: This feature will allow users to connect their Slack workspace and configure specific channels to receive real-time notifications for important updates and activities within our product. It eliminates the need to switch applications, keeping users informed directly where they communicate.
implementation_idea: Develop an OAuth-based integration with Slack's API to allow users to authorize our application and select channels for various notification types. Store user Slack workspace and channel preferences in the database.
expected_impact: Increase user engagement with notifications by ~40% and reduce time spent checking for updates in our tool by ~20%.

title: Configurable Keyboard Shortcuts
description: This feature will introduce a dedicated section in user settings allowing users to view, customize, and enable/disable keyboard shortcuts for common actions within the application. It will provide a more efficient workflow for power users and those who prefer keyboard navigation, reducing reliance on mouse-only interactions.
implementation_idea: Implement a global shortcut listener and a configuration UI. Store user-defined shortcuts in local storage or user profiles, mapping key combinations to existing application functions.
expected_impact: Increase power user efficiency by an estimated 20-30% for common tasks and improve overall user satisfaction for keyboard-centric users.

title: Automated API Doc-Code Sync
description: This feature automatically compares the API documentation with the actual codebase (e.g., OpenAPI/Swagger definitions, code annotations) and highlights discrepancies. It helps users by ensuring the documentation accurately reflects the current API, reducing confusion and development errors.
implementation_idea: Develop a CI/CD pipeline step that runs a linter or comparison tool against the API documentation and the deployed API's schema/code. This tool would generate a report of mismatches and potentially block deployments if critical discrepancies are found.
expected_impact: Reduce instances of outdated API documentation by 90% and decrease user-reported API integration issues by 25%.

title: Contextual AI Deep Dive
description: This feature allows users to request a 'deep dive' on any AI suggestion, prompting the AI to generate more detailed, nuanced, and less obvious insights by leveraging a broader range of internal and external data sources. It helps users by transforming generic suggestions into actionable, data-rich recommendations.
implementation_idea: Implement a 'Deep Dive' button next to each AI suggestion that triggers a secondary, more intensive AI query against an expanded knowledge base, potentially including real-time web search capabilities or integration with specialized data APIs.
expected_impact: Increase user satisfaction with AI suggestions by improving perceived intelligence and utility, leading to a ~25% increase in user engagement with AI-generated content.

title: Free Tier with Limited Feature Access
description: Introduce a free tier that allows users to explore core product functionalities without requiring credit card information. This enables potential users to experience the product's value proposition firsthand before committing to a paid subscription, addressing their desire to 'see before they buy'.
implementation_idea: Develop a new user registration flow that offers a 'Free Tier' option. This tier would gate access to advanced features and usage limits, while providing a functional subset of the product. Implement backend logic to enforce these feature and usage restrictions for free tier accounts.
expected_impact: Increase trial sign-ups by 20-30% and improve conversion rates to paid plans by reducing the initial barrier to entry and allowing users to self-qualify their interest.

title: Multi-Select Filter Panel
description: This feature introduces a persistent filter panel that allows users to select and apply multiple filtering criteria (e.g., date range, tags, categories) simultaneously. It enables users to combine different filters to precisely narrow down search results and locate desired content much more efficiently.
implementation_idea: Implement a UI component for a filter panel that supports checkboxes, date pickers, and multi-select dropdowns for various filter types. The backend will need to support combining multiple filter parameters in a single query.
expected_impact: Improve search result relevance and content discoverability, reducing time spent searching by an estimated 20-30% for complex queries.
